payload.description:
**As an** embedding pipeline, **I want** to store and retrieve embedding vectors from S3, **so that** expensive model invocations are avoided on re-runs.

Embedding vectors (as numpy arrays serialized to JSON) are stored in S3 at the path `embeddings/{model_id}/{key_prefix}/{key}.json`, where `key_prefix` is the first two hex characters of the cache key for S3 prefix-based partitioning. Follows the same boto3 patterns used in `plexus/reports/s3_utils.py`.

Error handling is crucial: S3 read failures must return `None` (cache miss) rather than crashing the pipeline. S3 write failures must be non-fatal (log and continue) since the embedding was already computed in memory.

## Key Files

- Modify: `plexus/analysis/embedding_cache.py`
- Modify: `plexus/analysis/embedding_cache_test.py`

## Dependencies

Story plx-19f3d6 (Deterministic cache key generation)
payload.title: S3 read/write for cached embeddings
